heading: 300+ features & 100M+ views
lead: Featured worldwide across newspapers, television, books, magazines, calendars and Government of India ministry publications — from the United Nations and India's NDTV, The Hindu, Times of India and Republic to the USA's WXYZ, Poland's TVN24, South Africa's Briefly and Germany's Missy. Tap any feature to read the original.
